layer_change_gcode:
;AFTER_LAYER_CHANGE
; Orca -> Klipper layer hook (wipes are throttled in Klipper by layer/time settings)
LAYER_CHANGE LAYER=[layer_num] TOOL=[current_extruder]
machine_end_gcode:
; --- OrcaSlicer -> Mainline Klipper END_PRINT (IDEX with wipe before park) ---

; Ensure absolute positioning
G90

; Small retract on active tool to relieve pressure
M83
G1 E-1.0 F1800
M82

; Lift nozzle safely off part
G91
G1 Z10 F900
G90

; Move to center for safe wipe travel
G1 X250 Y250 F12000

; Wipe both nozzles before cooldown parking
; (These macros automatically park inactive tool and wipe safely)
NOZZLE_WIPE TOOL=0
NOZZLE_WIPE TOOL=1

; Final park on wipers
PARK_T0_SAFE
PARK_T1_SAFE

; Turn off hotends and bed
M104 T0 S0
M104 T1 S0
M140 S0

; Turn off chamber heaters (cooling logic remains active)
TURN_OFF_CHAMBER

; Turn off part cooling fans
M106 S0

; Optional short cooldown dwell (helps chamber airflow stabilize)
G4 S20

; Disable steppers (optional — comment out if you prefer motors locked)
M84

; Restore RGB automatic status logic
RGB_AUTO_ONEND_PRINT
machine_start_gcode:
; --- OrcaSlicer -> Mainline Klipper START_PRINT (IDEX) ---

; Pre-set bed temp early
M140 S[first_layer_bed_temperature]

; Select the starting tool (Orca uses 0/1)
T[initial_tool]

; Call Klipper START_PRINT core
; Our macro expects: BED=<temp> EXTRUDER=<temp> TOOL=<0|1>
; We pass the *active tool's* first-layer nozzle temp.
START_PRINT BED=[first_layer_bed_temperature] EXTRUDER={first_layer_temperature[initial_tool]} TOOL=[initial_tool]

; Optional: also preheat the other tool to its first-layer temp (comment out if you don't want it)
; This does not override tool selection, it just warms the idle nozzle.
{if initial_tool==0} M104 T1 S{first_layer_temperature[1]} {endif}
{if initial_tool==1} M104 T0 S{first_layer_temperature[0]} {endif}

; (Optional future use) Provide metadata for macros that may use it later
; These are safe no-ops unless you create macros that consume them.
; SET_GCODE_VARIABLE MACRO=_START_META VARIABLE=total_layers VALUE={total_layer_count}
; SET_GCODE_VARIABLE MACRO=_START_META VARIABLE=x0 VALUE={first_layer_print_min[0]}
; SET_GCODE_VARIABLE MACRO=_START_META VARIABLE=y0 VALUE={first_layer_print_min[1]}
; SET_GCODE_VARIABLE MACRO=_START_META VARIABLE=x1 VALUE={first_layer_print_max[0]}
; SET_GCODE_VARIABLE MACRO=_START_META VARIABLE=y1 VALUE={first_layer_print_max[1]}

; After START_PRINT completes, your macros will already have:
; - homed
; - Z_TILT_ADJUST done
; - start wipe done (if enabled)
name: RatRig V-Core 4 IDEX 500 0.4 nozzle - Codex Tinman
printer_settings_id: RatRig V-Core 4 IDEX 500 0.4 nozzle - Codex Tinman
